rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although (1) the petitioner was shown to be Chul Sung Moon only, when the caption indicated that the attorney represents Chul Sung Moon and Kil Sung Moon, and both heirs signed and verified the second amended petition, (2) the date of death was missing from item 2a of the petition, but a date was typed in, following the statement in item 3 of the petition, and (3) the notice of hearing filed on 8/22/18 showed that it was a "second amended notice," but did not indicate that a second amended petition was to be heard, and the notice still showed that personal property was to be transferred.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although (1) the caption shows that the attorney represents Ribka Lakew only, but item 1 of the petition shows that both Ribka Lakew and Selome Lakew are the petitioners and both signed and verified the second amended petition, and (2) the notice of hearing still shows that personal property is to be transferred (when it is not).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JUNE N. KIM
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although (1) the caption of the Inventory and Appraisal does not indicate whom the attorney represents, (2) the second amended petition shows that the attorney represents, and the petitioner is, Eunkyoung Choi, but the petition was also signed and verified by Younghwan Choi, and (3) the notice still shows that personal property is to be transferred when it is not.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KWAN SOOK LAU
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although neither Probate Code Section 15804, which applies to trusts, nor 6401, which applies in intestate estates, applies here; Probate Code Section 21110 applies (wherein the issue of a transfere who fails to survive take in the transferee's place). Status of closing the estate set for 3/18/20.
